description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named build that runs every 4 months and on workflow dispatch. The workflow should have a single job running on windows-2022 for multiple architectures, build types, and portable configurations. The job checks out the repository, installs the v141_xp toolchain, adds msbuild to PATH, creates a build environment, configures CMake, builds the project, and installs it if the build type is Release. Finally, it uploads artifacts for Release builds.
